context.audience: Full-stack developers building autonomous AI workflows, startup teams creating AI-powered assistants, enterprise developers automating complex business processes with LLMs
pain_points: Designing reliable agent loops that don't get stuck in infinite cycles or hallucinate tool calls
Managing tool definitions and function schemas across multiple LLM providers
Observability and debugging of multi-step agent workflows in production
Cost control when agents make unpredictable numbers of LLM calls per task
Balancing agent autonomy with human-in-the-loop oversight for safety
subtopics: Tool calling and function schema design
